subtitle: Week starts with Marie on leave, James returning late
context: Kevin manages HR Systems at Oxford with a diverse portfolio spanning PeopleXD, Cority, dashboards and operational support. Multiple colleagues are on annual leave (Marie until 12 June, James until 18 June), and there are several active projects requiring attention including IM Principles URL updates, H&S system evaluations, and Cority integrations.
